notes: Fail diff introduces two hardcoded constants (CONSECUTIVE_FAILURE_LIMIT = 3, CONTEXT_HARD_LIMIT = 120000) presented as 'invariants' of the runtime — shipped-premise framing that treats a spec default as universal truth. Spec itself describes 3-strike as a chosen threshold, not an invariant, and never prescribes a context token limit. Pass diff frames them as heuristics with a config file and explanatory comments. NEW_DEFECT: the fail-diff violates no explicit spec clause — it adds details the spec didn't specify. PM lens must notice the shipped-premise framing unprompted.
